completed_tasks.name: Plan 01 requirements map, golden cases, and eval rubric
Plan 02 prepared-data contracts, source-card builders, SQLite catalog, and embedding corpus format
Plan 03 Qdrant embedding/search index path and retrieval evaluation
Plan 04 Qwen/Yandex gates, runnable workflow smoke, deterministic extraction probes, and diagnostic trace contracts

completed_tasks.progress: Full local corpus now has 36321 source cards/chunks: FedStat 6905 and World Bank 29416 after deterministic duplicate handling. CKAN remains skipped unless network/catalog access is explicitly enabled.

completed_tasks.name: Recovery: full Qdrant/Yandex embedding build
completed_tasks.progress: Embedding cache was 9630/36321 at 2026-05-10T07:34Z. Build PID file points to 77528 with workers=3 and batch-size=64. Heartbeat automation monitor-full-embedding-build is ACTIVE every 5 minutes and must remain active.

remaining_tasks.name: Let full embedding build finish or be restarted by the heartbeat monitor if PID stops before cache reaches corpus count
After full cache/index completion, verify embedding-index-manifest.json records ready status, current corpus hash, vector_count 36321, and Qdrant collection phase1_source_cards
Refresh prepared-data-readiness.md and demo-readiness.json, which still describe the old 11-card gated demo state
Run source discovery and agent smoke tests on the full index, including FedStat and World Bank cases; CKAN cases should remain explicit gates until CKAN data is prepared
Promote 2-3 golden cases into deterministic extraction smoke once retrieval returns relevant source cards
Run gsd verification for Phase 1 after refreshed readiness and smoke evidence are in place

blockers.description: Full embedding population depends on Yandex embedding API network/DNS stability and rate limits.
blockers.workaround: Embedding cache is append-only/resumable. Default retries were increased to 20. Heartbeat monitor restarts the build with workers=3 if PID stops before completion.

blockers.description: CKAN/NSED is not included in the current full local source-card corpus.
blockers.workaround: Keep CKAN cases explicitly gated or run bounded CKAN API preparation when network/catalog access is available and approved.

blockers.description: Readiness artifacts from Plan 05 still report 11 cards and gated embeddings.
blockers.workaround: Treat source-cards-manifest.json, source-catalog-manifest.json, and embedding-corpus-manifest.json as the current truth until readiness docs are regenerated.

human_actions_pending.context: The user explicitly asked for a handoff without stopping regular embedding checks.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to enable bounded CKAN/NSED catalog preparation.
human_actions_pending.context: FedStat and World Bank are prepared from local dumps; CKAN is trusted but not locally prepared in this recovery run.

decisions.decision: Prepare and embed every locally available FedStat and World Bank source card, not the old 11-card demo subset.
decisions.rationale: The user clarified Phase 1 goal was full data preparation without compromises.

decisions.decision: Use the append-only embedding cache as the progress source of truth during long builds.
decisions.rationale: Qdrant upsert can be resumed from cached vectors, and cache count is easy to compare with embedding-corpus.jsonl chunk count.

decisions.decision: Run Yandex embedding requests with workers=3, not 6.
decisions.rationale: workers=6 triggered 429 Too Many Requests; workers=3 made steady progress.

decisions.decision: Bound source-card embedding text to avoid Yandex 400 errors on very long metadata.
decisions.rationale: Long FedStat metadata text exceeded provider limits; source-card text is now truncated deterministically for embeddings.

decisions.decision: Increase default Yandex embedding retries to 20.
decisions.rationale: A transient DNS failure was killing the long build after too few attempts.

decisions.decision: Use a separate partial Qdrant snapshot for development and smoke testing while the full build writes the main index.
decisions.rationale: Partial read-only dev collection avoids disturbing the main collection and already proved FedStat source discovery is meaningful.

background_processes.name: Heartbeat monitor
background_processes.instruction: Do not delete or pause until full embedding build finishes.

verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_embedding_index.py tests/test_source_catalog_and_corpus.py tests/test_hybrid_retrieval.py -q -> 7 passed
Partial source-discovery smoke over phase1_source_cards_partial returned meaningful FedStat hits for GDP, investment, population, credit organizations, and industrial production queries.
Embedding monitor automation file exists at /Users/a/.codex/automations/monitor-full-embedding-build/automation.toml and status is ACTIVE.
next_action: Check embedding progress with wc -l .local/dataagent/phase1/embedding-cache.jsonl .local/dataagent/phase1/embedding-corpus.jsonl and ps -p $(cat .local/dataagent/phase1/embedding-build.pid). If cache equals corpus count, refresh the embedding index manifest/readiness docs and run full-index retrieval smoke tests.
context_notes: The main correction after Plan 05 is that the early demo artifacts falsely represented a tiny prepared subset as enough. The durable truth is now the full source-card/catalog/corpus manifests with 36321 chunks. Keep monitoring embeddings; do not stop the heartbeat. Development can continue against a partial Qdrant snapshot for FedStat-only tests while the full build completes.
